ownership.name: Rob Walton (Walton-Penner Family Ownership Group)
ownership.style: Richest NFL owner; invested in winning; professional sports management group; bought team for $4.65B in 2022
ownership.tendencies: Supportive of Payton and Paton; patient with roster construction; backed AFC Championship run

gm.name: George Paton
gm.philosophy: Patient roster builder; retains own players (90%+ of 2025 starting snaps returning); smart trade execution (Waddle acquisition)
gm.analytics_approach: Hybrid — modern analytics with strong scouting; Minnesota Vikings front office background

head_coach.name: Sean Payton
head_coach.scheme_offense: Saints-style offense — short passing game, diverse formations, creative play-calling; developing Bo Nix
head_coach.scheme_defense: DC Vance Joseph; 3-4 base; aggressive pressures; physical run defense

decision_makers.primary: George Paton (GM) with Sean Payton (HC) having significant influence

roster_2026.qb_situation: Bo Nix — 3rd year; breakout expected under Payton's continued development; AFC Championship appearance validates trajectory
key_signings: Jaylen Waddle (WR, acquired from Dolphins for 1st-round pick)
roster_2026.cap_space: Healthy — retained most of roster through smart contracts

traded_away: Round 1 Pick 30 (to Dolphins in Waddle trade)

needs.reason: Garett Bolles turning 34, McGlinchey is 31; need young tackle for future; could be in play at #62
Singleton and Strnad will both be on wrong side of 30 by season start; need youth at inside linebacker for Vance Joseph's system
Need more impact from tight end position; Max Klare (Ohio State) and Eli Stowers (Vanderbilt) could be options at #62
